scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Harvard emphasizes academic accomplishment and broad liberal arts and sciences study, but the cited page does not provide a single minimum course-rigor formula.
areas.detail: Harvard emphasizes academic accomplishment and broad liberal arts and sciences study, but the cited page does not provide a single minimum course-rigor formula.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: Harvard requires a school report that includes a counselor letter and two teacher recommendations.
areas.detail: Harvard requires a school report that includes a counselor letter and two teacher recommendations.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: Harvard requires a personal essay plus five required short-answer Harvard supplement questions.
areas.detail: Harvard requires a personal essay plus five required short-answer Harvard supplement questions.
